title: run_sse_stream silently drops initial connection error
description: In client_task.rs run_sse_stream (line 662), subscribe_events errors are matched as Err(_) => return with the error discarded. The StreamEnded notification is then sent, triggering the reconnect loop. On a persistent failure (auth error, TLS mismatch, wrong URL) the UI shows 'Reconnecting' indefinitely with no error message. The maintenance consequence is: auth and TLS failures at the SSE layer are indistinguishable from network drops, making production diagnosis impossible. AuthFailed errors from subscribe_events should be forwarded to the UI and should halt reconnect, mirroring the behavior in bootstrap_session.
